English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
PWA Health Group records
PWA Health Group
7528
2.2 cubic feet. 2.2 cubic feet.
1990-1991. Correspondence, notes, bibliographies, articles, conference programs. Correspondence, notes, bibliographies, articles, and conference programs related to AIDS, particularly new drugs for the treatment of opportunistic infections and the specific issues relating to women with AIDS. Includes correspondence with drug companies and files about the Countdown/18 Months Plan of ACT UP/NY's Treatment and Data Committee. Collection material in English 2097338
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
B.C. Beredo
Date completed:
July 2000
EAD encoding:
Mireille Lee, July 2000
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
PWA (People With AIDS) Health Group formed in New York City in 1987 to facilitate access to experimental drugs for the treatment of HIV/AIDS-related infections. The Countdown/18 Months Plan was a plan to make the five major opportunistic infections which claim the most lives treatable in the next year and one-half.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, notes, bibliographies, articles, and conference programs related to AIDS, particularly new drugs for the treatment of opportunistic infections and the specific issues relating to women with AIDS. Includes correspondence with drug companies and files about the Countdown/18 Months Plan of ACT UP/NY's Treatment and Data Committee.
SERIES LIST
AIDS
Box 1
General
Boxes 1-2
Notebooks
Box 2
Miscellaneous Supporting Materials
Box 2
Separated Materials
Periodicals Separated from #7528:
AIDS Surveillance Update: Dec. 1990; Jan. 1991
AIDS Treatment News: no. 108 (1990); nos. 122, 125, 129, 132-133, 138, 140-141 (1991)
AIDS Update: May 4, Aug. 24, Aug. 10, Sept. 21, Nov. 2 1990
Being Alive/Long Beach Newsletter: June, Sept. 1991
BOTA (Bulletin of Experimental Treatment for AIDS): Nov. 1988; June 1989; Aug., Nov. 1990
Bulletin: State Communities AID Association: Dec. 1990
CFIDS Chronicle: Mar. 1991
Dallas Buyer's Club Newsletter: May 1991
Dateline: National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases: Sept. 1991
Digest: A Review of Issues addressed by ACT UP's T + D committee during its past week of activities: nos. 87-88, 96, 99-103, 105-106, 118-199 (1991)
Health Care for All: Mar. 14 1991
HIV/AIDS Surveillance: Mar., July, Aug. 1991
New York Citizens' AIDS Lobby Alert: Apr. 23 1991
News from ICAAC (Interscience Conference on Antimicrobial Agents and Chemotherapy): 1990
NewSource: Oct. 1991
Notes from the Underground: Jan., July/Aug. 1991
PWA Coalition Newsline: July/Aug. 1991
STNews: Jan. 1991
The Blue Sheet: Feb. 6 1991
Treatment Issues: Nov. 30 1990; Mar. 28, May 15, Aug. 30. 1991
Treatment Issues Bulletins: Oct. 1991
Treatment Issues Report: v.2, no.8; v.2, no.11 1992
Treatment Update: May 1991
U.S. Regulatory Reporter: Apr. 1989
UMTFA (Upper Manhattan Task Force on AIDS): Fall 1991
Cite As:
PWA Health Group. Records, #7528. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Opportunistic infections. Pharmaceutical policy. Drug utilization. Medical care -- New York (N.Y.) HIV infections. AIDS (Disease)
